---
title: "Download the Handbook"
title-block-style: none
number-sections: false
sidebar: false
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

## Get the PDF & EPUB

The complete handbook is free to read online. For the formatted **PDF** and **EPUB** versions -- optimized for offline reading, printing, and annotation -- enter your email below. You'll receive the download links instantly.

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon=false}
**What you'll also get**: A short series with the strongest ideas from the book, plus ~1 monthly update on the PROSE framework and APM. Unsubscribe anytime.
:::

<div id="kit-form-container">
<script async data-uid="6bee764071" src="https://the-ai-native-mind.kit.com/6bee764071/index.js"></script>
</div>

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" icon=false}
Prefer to read online? [Start with the thesis -->](handbook/ch01-the-agentic-sdlc-thesis.qmd)
:::

:::

::: {.content-hidden when-format="html"}

You're reading the offline version. Visit the website for the latest updates and additional resources:

- **Read online:** [danielmeppiel.github.io/agentic-sdlc-handbook](https://danielmeppiel.github.io/agentic-sdlc-handbook/)
- **APM on GitHub:** [github.com/microsoft/apm](https://github.com/microsoft/apm)
- **Follow the author:** [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielmeppiel/)

:::
